mapper.insert: insert into scooter_command (command_id, scooter_id, scooter_code, order_id, command_type, payload, status, retry_count, max_retry_count, error_message, send_time, ack_time, create_time, update_time) values (#{commandId}, #{scooterId}, #{scooterCode}, #{orderId}, #{commandType}, #{payload}, #{status}, #{retryCount}, #{maxRetryCount}, #{errorMessage}, #{sendTime}, #{ackTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: update scooter_command set status = 1, send_time = #{sendTime}, error_message = null, update_time = now() where command_id = #{commandId}
update scooter_command set status = 3, error_message = #{errorMessage}, update_time = now() where command_id = #{commandId}
update scooter_command set status = 2, ack_time = #{ackTime}, error_message = null, update_time = now() where command_id = #{commandId} and status in (0, 1, 3)
update scooter_command set status = 3, ack_time = #{ackTime}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, update_time = now() where command_id = #{commandId} and status in (0, 1, 3)
mapper.select: select id, command_id, scooter_id, scooter_code, order_id, command_type, payload, status, retry_count, max_retry_count, error_message, send_time, ack_time, create_time, update_time from scooter_command where command_id = #{commandId} limit 1

select id, command_id, scooter_id, scooter_code, order_id, command_type, payload, status, retry_count, max_retry_count, error_message, send_time, ack_time, create_time, update_time from scooter_command where status in (0, 1) and retry_count < max_retry_count and ((status = 0 and create_time <= #{deadline}) or (status = 1 and send_time <= #{deadline})) order by id asc limit #{limit}

select id, command_id, scooter_id, scooter_code, order_id, command_type, payload, status, retry_count, max_retry_count, error_message, send_time, ack_time, create_time, update_time from scooter_command where status in (0, 1) and retry_count >= max_retry_count and ((status = 0 and create_time <= #{deadline}) or (status = 1 and send_time <= #{deadline})) order by id asc limit #{limit}
mapper.update: update scooter_command set status = 1, retry_count = retry_count + 1, send_time = #{sendTime}, error_message = null, update_time = now() where command_id = #{commandId} and status in (0, 1) and retry_count < max_retry_count
update scooter_command set error_message = #{errorMessage}, update_time = now() where command_id = #{commandId} and status in (0, 1)

update scooter_command set status = 4, error_message = #{errorMessage}, update_time = now() where status in (0, 1) and retry_count >= max_retry_count and ((status = 0 and create_time <= #{deadline}) or (status = 1 and send_time <= #{deadline}))
update scooter_command set status = 4, error_message = #{errorMessage}, update_time = now() where command_id = #{commandId} and status in (0, 1)
